tags.note: More correctly, a crossing that has been modified to take bicycles - not a true toucan.
Cycle crossing + pedestrian crossing, so it's (sort of) a Toucan
Even though Vinery Road is longer a through road there is a zebra crossing here!
There is a zebra outside the Zebra.
Zebra crossing, but it's unenforceable (as it's on private land)
